name: Chocolate Coffee Cones
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 6-inch circles from wax paper; cut each circle in half to form cones.
2. Secure the edges with tape.
3. Melt dark chocolate in a pan and let it cool slightly until thickened.
4. Transfer melted chocolate to a ziplock bag and make a tiny hole at the bottom corner.
5. Drizzle a small amount of melted chocolate into the lower 2 inches of each cone.
6. Let the cones cool completely.
7. Melt white chocolate and allow it to cool slightly until thickened.
8. Brush a thin layer of melted white chocolate over the dark chocolate layer in each cone, ensuring the bottom is covered.
9. Chill the cones until firm.
10. In a bowl, beat cream cheese with confectioner's sugar and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
11. Gradually add coffee liqueur to the mixture and continue beating until combined.
12. Add whipped topping to the mixture and transfer it into a pastry bag.
13. Pipe the filling into each cone.
14. Chill the cones until firm and ready to serve.
